text: Build tasks/T-029/fill_site.py — a Python script that fills the micro-site template at tasks/T-027/template/index.html by replacing its {{TOKENS}} with a client's details read from a JSON file (brand, category, tagline, about, 3 services each name/desc/price, address, hours, contact_email), writing a ready index.html to an output path given as argv. Include a small example client JSON + a README line. Then: git add -A && git -c user.name=Mini -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Mini] T-029 site-fill script' && (git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)); then bin/warroom-say '[Mini] done: T-029 fill_site.py'.
